_description: Size ceiling for the meta-agent-chat system prompt (char count, not tokens — deterministic without a tokenizer). Phase 0 captures current size; Phase 7 tightens.
_seed_instructions: To regenerate: WRITE_PROMPT_BUDGET=1 pnpm vitest run test/refactor-phase0.test.ts

phase_targets._comment: Target char count after each phase completes. Phase 7 slims the base prompt by extracting workflows to skills/meta/.

_note: Measures meta-agent-chat.ts file size, not a runtime buildMetaAgentChatPrompt call, because deploy/ tsconfig doesn't include control-plane/. Drift detection is equivalent: any prompt growth changes the file.
